name: Victoria Racing Club
message: The Victoria Racing Club was founded in 1864, from its foundation in 1864 until 2001, the Victoria Racing Club was the responsible authority for the conduct of thoroughbred racing in the State of Victoria, Australia.Today, the VRC still operates Flemington under a board of directors. More than 30,000 thousand club members enjoy all the benefits of club members. The total amount of data leakage is 128.1 GB
